Posted at 8:10 AM EST

Y'know something I find really annoying about the anime community 😭? The fact so many fans seem to not believe in platonic relationships...

People will see two characters that care for eachother and immediately assume it's romantic, and sometimes the two characters don't even care for eachother 🚶‍♀️

It lowkey makes me feel like these people don't...have friends...cause why do you think everything is romantic 😭

It's either they don't have friends or don't have any deep platonic connection with someone, cause a lot of the things they go wild for in anime are things my friends and I would and already do for eachother 🤨

It's weird asl, like maybe y'all need some friends 😭

moving on,

This is probably the first time I'm doing this so quickly but another version of this same prompt shall be posted in a second 🙏

Was testing and—

Damn bro 😭

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
